name: Heroes of Flavor crystals au
description:
***Flavor frenzy au so uhhhh enjoy***

***BEHOLD! Welcome to Flavor frenzy animal city! This is the place for bears and animals. Let's meet Sushi and her friends shall we?***

***SUSHI*** The main leader of her friend group. With her two best friends ***CUPCAKE and PEPPER***

***UBE and FLAN*** These two are twin brothers, Ube is an calm one, while Flan is really energetic!

***STARFRUIT and MOCHA*** They are both assistants of Shaworma's library.

***PINEBERRY and WAFFLE*** They may be rivals, but I'm they'll get along!

***CAVIAR and ROQUEFORT*** They are the married couple, Caviar is a beautiful bear, who adores her husband, Roquefort, an artist of Glucose Gallery.

***MATCHA and BACON*** Matcha is the city's star actor and a pop star! With a help of Bacon's photography.

***JAM and MERINGUE*** Jam sells and makes dresses, and Meringue works at a salon.

***OKRA, GUMBALL and POMEGRANATE*** Pomegranate is an DJ who helps with Matcha's concert, Gumball is a bit clumsy but really helpful! And for Okra? He's the city's sheriff!

***CANDY CORN and MARSHMALLOW*** Candy Corn runs a carnival for Halloween! And Marshmallow is the Easter's egg hunter champion!

***EGGNOG and POPSICLE*** Eggnog bakes sweet treats in his restaurant, Popsicle is a lifeguard of Lighthouse isle!

***Have fun***
creator: Urlocal_Pineberryspirit
